user.title: DroneMobile Configuration
user.description: Enter your DroneMobile credentials. Initial setup may take up to 30 seconds.

data_description.update_interval: How often to fetch vehicle data (2-60 minutes)
data_description.override_lock_state_check: Send lock/unlock commands even if already in that state

mfa.title: Two-Factor Authentication
mfa.description: Enter the verification code from your {challenge_description} to complete sign-in.

data_description.mfa_code: The one-time code sent to your device. Do not include spaces.

select_vehicle.title: Select Vehicle
select_vehicle.description: Select the vehicle you want to add to Home Assistant

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to DroneMobile. Please check your internet connection.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid email or password. Please try again.
error.invalid_mfa_code: Invalid or expired verification code. Please try again.
error.mfa_failed: Two-factor authentication failed. Please restart the setup and try again.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This vehicle is already configured in Home Assistant.
abort.no_available_vehicles: No vehicles available. All vehicles are already configured.

data_description.update_interval: How often to fetch vehicle data (2-60 minutes)
data_description.override_lock_state_check: Send lock/unlock commands even if already in that state

refresh_device_status.name: Refresh device status
refresh_device_status.description: Poll the vehicle for latest status. Use sparingly as it consumes data and vehicle battery.
